name: Greek Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients until well combined but not overmixed.
3. Place the meat mixture in a 13x9 inch metal baking pan and shape it into a loaf measuring 9x5 inches.
4. Bake the meat loaf for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
5. Allow the meat loaf to rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
